# Codex Global Skills - Index for AI Agents

Use this file to discover which skill to load. Each skill lives in a directory of the same name under `skills/` and contains a `SKILL.md`.

## Skills

brandkit
  Premium brand-kit generation for logo systems, identity boards, and visual guidelines.
  Triggers: brand kit, brand guideline, identity system, logo system, visual world, branding board.

brutalist-skill
  Industrial brutalist UI direction with Swiss-grid, terminal, and tactical interface aesthetics.
  Triggers: brutalist ui, industrial ui, swiss grid, tactical interface, terminal aesthetic, blueprint style.

bug-trace-root-cause
  Structured debugging workflow for tracing a bug from symptom to proven root cause.
  Triggers: debug bug, root cause, investigate failure, regression, explain why this bug happens.

frontend-performance-review
  Frontend performance and stability review for leaks, jank, excessive re-renders, and missing cleanup.
  Triggers: frontend performance, memory leak, rerender, jank, lag, cleanup, performance review.

gpt-tasteskill
  High-end editorial frontend direction with bold layout variance and advanced motion ideas.
  Triggers: premium ui, awwwards style, editorial layout, strong motion, design upgrade, gpt taste.

gsap-core
  GSAP core API guidance for basic animation, easing, transforms, and stagger.
  Triggers: gsap basics, gsap to, gsap from, easing, stagger, javascript animation.

gsap-frameworks
  GSAP usage in Vue, Svelte, Nuxt, and other non-React frameworks.
  Triggers: gsap vue, gsap svelte, gsap nuxt, framework animation lifecycle.

gsap-performance
  GSAP performance guidance for smooth animation and lower layout thrash.
  Triggers: gsap performance, smooth animation, 60fps, animation optimization, layout thrash.

gsap-plugins
  GSAP plugin guidance for ScrollTo, Flip, Draggable, SplitText, and related plugins.
  Triggers: gsap plugins, flip, draggable, splittext, scrollto, motionpath.

gsap-react
  GSAP patterns for React and Next.js with refs, useGSAP, and cleanup.
  Triggers: gsap react, usegsap, nextjs animation, react animation cleanup.

gsap-scrolltrigger
  Scroll-driven GSAP animation with pinning, scrubbing, and trigger setup.
  Triggers: scrolltrigger, scroll animation, parallax, pin section, scrub animation.

gsap-timeline
  GSAP timeline sequencing for multi-step animation choreography.
  Triggers: gsap timeline, animation sequence, choreography, labels, multi-step motion.

gsap-utils
  GSAP utility helpers like clamp, mapRange, wrap, random, and interpolation.
  Triggers: gsap utils, clamp, maprange, wrap, normalize, interpolate.

imagegen-frontend-mobile
  Premium mobile app concept generation through image-first UI exploration.
  Triggers: mobile app concept, app screen design, ios ui concept, android ui concept.

imagegen-frontend-web
  Premium website section-by-section image reference generation.
  Triggers: website concept image, landing page reference, section mockup, web image generation.

image-to-code-skill
  Image-first workflow that creates or uses design references before implementing frontend code.
  Triggers: image to code, implement from mockup, code from design image, visual-first frontend.

minimalist-skill
  Editorial minimalist interface direction with restrained color and clean hierarchy.
  Triggers: minimalist ui, editorial ui, clean interface, warm monochrome, flat premium design.

output-skill
  Enforces complete outputs without placeholders or silent truncation.
  Triggers: full output, no placeholder, exhaustive response, complete file generation.

project-quick-onboard
  Fast technical onboarding for an unfamiliar repo, stack, structure, and likely entry points.
  Triggers: onboard repo, understand codebase, project overview, where to start in this repo.

redesign-skill
  Upgrades an existing website or app without rewriting it from scratch.
  Triggers: redesign existing project, improve current ui, polish existing frontend, upgrade design.

soft-skill
  High-end design polish rules for typography, spacing, surfaces, and overall premium feel.
  Triggers: visual polish, high-end design, premium spacing, typography system, agency quality.

solution-direction
  Suggests solution directions and tradeoffs without jumping straight into implementation.
  Triggers: suggest approach, solution options, recommend direction, brainstorm fix, advise first.

stitch-skill
  Generates DESIGN.md guidance for Google Stitch and similar AI-driven design workflows.
  Triggers: google stitch, design md, semantic design system, stitch design rules.

taste-skill
  Anti-slop frontend direction for landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns.
  Triggers: anti slop frontend, landing page redesign, portfolio redesign, design-taste-frontend.

taste-skill-v1
  Legacy v1 version of the taste skill for older workflows.
  Triggers: taste skill v1, legacy frontend skill, design-taste-frontend-v1.
